title: The Mauchline Lady.
content:
Tune - "I had a horse, I had nae mair."


        When first I came to Stewart Kyle,
            My mind it was nae steady;
        Where'er I gaed, where'er I rade,
            A mistress still I had ay:
        But when I came roun' by Mauchline town,
            Not dreadin' any body,
        My heart was caught before I thought,
            And by a Mauchline lady.
meaning:
Robert Burns's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Mauchline Lady."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
